description_long: This is a round wall clock with a white face and a beige or light tan frame. The clock features bold black Arabic numerals marking each hour, with smaller black tick marks for the minutes. Three hands are present: a black hour hand, a black minute hand, and a thin blue second hand, all mounted at the center. The clock face is protected by a clear cover, likely made of glass or plastic, and the frame appears to be made of a lightweight material such as plastic or thin metal. There are no decorative elements, giving the clock a clean, functional appearance suitable for practical use. The back of the clock is flat and dark, with a small hole likely for wall mounting.
description: A round wall clock with a white face, bold black Arabic numerals, and a beige frame, featuring three hands and a clear protective cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full clock face, numerals, and all three hands clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the beige frame thickness and the slight protrusion of the clear cover.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat, dark back and a small mounting hole, with no face details visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the frame depth and partial clock face.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with bold black Arabic numerals, black tick marks, and three central hands; minimalistic and functional.
